title: cyclophyllum subulatum
intro: Cyclophyllum subulatum is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to New Caledonia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its bark and leaves, which contain compounds that exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Cyclophyllum subulatum include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its antiseptic, antipyretic, and anti-rheumatic properties. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the bark, leaves, or roots in water or a solvent, and then consumed orally or applied topically.
